landingCopy.hero: Never miss another customer call. Your AI receptionist answers 24/7.
landingCopy.subhead: An always-on AI phone agent for dental offices, clinics, restaurants, and home-services pros — it answers every call, books appointments into your calendar, and never takes a sick day. Starts at $199/month.
bullets: Answers 100% of calls in under 2 rings — nights, weekends, and lunch rushes included
Books, reschedules, and confirms appointments straight into Google Calendar, Calendly, or your PMS
Sounds natural and on-brand — callers get a warm, professional voice, not a clunky robot
Texts you a summary and recording after every call so nothing falls through the cracks
Live in 48 hours — no new hardware, just forward your existing number

faq.q: Does it really sound like a person?
faq.a: Yes. Most callers don't realize they're talking to an AI. It handles interruptions, accents, and follow-up questions naturally — and hands off to a human when a call needs one.

faq.q: Can it book appointments into my system?
faq.a: It connects to Google Calendar, Calendly, and popular dental/clinic scheduling systems, so bookings land directly on your calendar with no double-entry.

faq.q: What happens to my current phone number?
faq.a: Nothing changes for your customers. You simply forward your existing line to your AI receptionist, and you can switch it off anytime.

faq.q: Is it compliant for a medical office?
faq.a: We support HIPAA-aligned configurations and secure call handling. We'll walk your office through consent, recording, and data-retention settings during onboarding.

socialPosts.text: A missed call is a missed customer. The average local business misses 30% of inbound calls. Your AI receptionist answers every single one — 24/7, in under 2 rings. 👇

Dental offices lose $$$ every month to calls that ring out during lunch and after hours. We built an AI receptionist that answers, books, and confirms appointments around the clock — so the chair stays full.
Your front desk is busy with the patient in front of them. Meanwhile the phone rings… and the next patient goes to a competitor. AI receptionist = no more missed bookings.
It books the appointment, texts you the summary, and emails the recording. You wake up to a fuller calendar, not a voicemail backlog.

Build update: a 3-location home-services company just routed all overflow calls to our AI. Result: 41 after-hours bookings in week one that would have gone to voicemail. Phones don't sleep — neither should your booking.
Restaurant owners: stop choosing between the phone and the dining room. AI answers reservations and takeout calls while you run the floor. (demo clip)
We don't sell 'AI'. We sell the appointments you're losing every time a call goes unanswered.
Case study: a single-dentist practice in Phoenix cut front-desk phone time by 60% and recovered 22 booked visits in a month — all from calls that used to ring out. Here's the setup.
Free 7-day trial, no new hardware. Forward your number, watch it answer. If it doesn't book real appointments, don't pay us.
Drop your business type below and I'll show you exactly what your AI receptionist would say when a customer calls 🧵

emailSequence.subject: Your AI receptionist is ready to answer 👇
emailSequence.body: Welcome! You're minutes from never missing a call again. Forward your business line to your new AI receptionist and place a test call to hear it in action. Reply here if anything's unclear — a real human reads these.

emailSequence.subject: How it books appointments (without double-entry)
emailSequence.body: Connect your Google Calendar, Calendly, or scheduling system and your AI receptionist will book, reschedule, and confirm appointments directly onto your calendar. Here's the 5-minute setup so every call turns into a booking.

emailSequence.subject: The calls you're losing after 5pm
emailSequence.body: Most local businesses miss a third of their calls — and after-hours is the worst. Turn on 24/7 answering and capture the bookings that used to hit voicemail. Here's how one clinic recovered 22 visits in a month.

emailSequence.subject: Make it sound exactly like your front desk
emailSequence.body: Customize the greeting, tone, and FAQs so callers get on-brand answers about hours, pricing, and services. Most offices set this up in under 10 minutes. Here's the customization checklist.

emailSequence.subject: Your trial ends soon — keep your calendar full
emailSequence.body: Your free trial is almost up. Upgrade to keep 24/7 answering, calendar booking, and call summaries running. Plans start at $199/month — far less than one missed patient. Choose your plan here.
